Portal. (sm) 1. Abertura ou porta de entrada principal. 2. Um meio de acesso para a próxima realidade. O cinema é um portal — entre tempos, entre histórias, entre quem fomos, somos e podemos ser. Nas telas, memórias ganham forma e força, criam novas narrativas e se expandem para além da ficção. O cinema nacional projeta um Brasil pulsante e vivo. Matéria-prima para nós e para tantas outras. Com Cine Portal, convidamos você a ocupar esse espaço com orgulho. Celebramos a arte e a cultura como territórios essenciais, acreditando que histórias projetadas também projetam futuros. fotografia @brunasussekind assistente de fotografia @guidodowsley_ @eloypk modelos @adamsgabi @_grazimuniz direção de arte @raphael_tepedino filmmaker @brunasozzi edição de vídeo @brunasozzi stylist @jujubonjour assistente stylist @padillamanu beleza @tailimabeauty, @julianarodriguesmua & @mariananunesk  produção executiva @duarteanna_ @geraldoprjr @adriano_valente @oppose._ estilo @mahfranklin, @thidú, @julianatoller, @carolpin & @coucou.carolina ateliê @mariaterezadasnevesmarques, Aline Negrin, Linda Roffe & Raquel Saraiva marketing e branding Haight @beatrxzgm, @fonsecaxjulia, @larawalverde, @larissenes, @dearagaoleticia, @lochifarelli & @ninaamarante agradecimentos especiais @alexia.kronig @bernardopraguer @coucou.carolina @filipefilipefilipef @mariaterezadasnevesmarques Maria Dartora Roffé @lcsprszz @pedrocunhapedro @scorpionsznisforever @vacomtudo @vivisnarciso equipamentos @oliverequipamentos

entity_data.img_caption:
The image is a promotional advertisement for a sale event. The background of the image features a dark, textured fabric with a subtle pattern that resembles a woven or knitted material. The texture gives the impression of a high-quality, possibly premium fabric.

Prominently displayed across the center of the image in large, bold white letters is the word "SALE," which stands out against the dark background. Below the word "SALE," there is additional text in smaller white font that provides details about the sale:

- "ATÉ 50% OFF EM PEÇAS SELECIONADAS" translates to "UP TO 50% OFF SELECTED PIECES."
- "+ 10% OFF CUPOM 10EXTRA" translates to "PLUS 10% OFF WITH THE CODE 10EXTRA."

These texts indicate that customers can enjoy discounts on selected items and an extra 10% off when using a specific discount code. The use of both Portuguese and English suggests that the advertisement is targeting a bilingual audience, likely in a region where both languages are commonly used, such as Brazil.

In the bottom right corner of the image, there is a small rectangular logo or brand tag. The logo consists of a black rectangle with white text inside it. The text within the logo reads "HAGIYI," which could be the name of the brand or store offering the sale.

Overall, the design of the advertisement is clean and straightforward, focusing on the key information about the sale without any distracting elements. The use of contrasting colors (white text on a dark background) ensures that the important information stands out clearly.

The top has thin straps and a scoop neckline, while the bottom is a high-waisted style with a thong back. The person has their hands on their hips and is looking directly at the camera. The word "SALE" is prominently displayed twice, once on each side of the person's torso, indicating that the image is likely part of a promotional or advertising campaign for a sale event. The overall aesthetic is simple and minimalistic, focusing on the clothing and the message of the sale.

The image is a black-and-white photograph featuring a woman standing in front of a building with architectural elements that include arched windows and balconies. The building has a Mediterranean or Spanish architectural style, characterized by its white walls and tiled roofs. 

The woman is positioned on the ground level, slightly to the right side of the image. She is wearing a dark dress and appears to be looking towards the camera. Her posture is upright, and she seems to be standing still.

The building itself has multiple levels. The ground floor features large arched windows and a balcony with a metal railing. Above the ground floor, there are two more stories visible. The upper story has a similar design with arched windows and balconies, but these are smaller compared to those on the ground floor. The roof of the building is covered with terracotta tiles, which are typical for Mediterranean architecture.

In the background, there is another building partially visible, also with similar architectural features. This building has a balcony on the top floor and a window with a metal grille. The overall scene suggests a residential area with a historical or traditional setting.

The photograph captures a moment of stillness, with the woman as the focal point against the backdrop of the building. The monochromatic color scheme adds a timeless quality to the image, emphasizing the architectural details and the woman's presence.
